title: In the last five years, 26 countries have been food insecurity hotspots mostly concentrated in Sub-Saharan Africa and the Middle East
subtitle: Food insecurity hotspots by level of concern and its drivers
textParagraph: In the most recent report (June to October 2025), 13 countries are identified as hunger hotspots. Over the last five years, a total of 26 countries have been classified as hunger hotspots at various points in time.
visdescription: In the most recent report (June to October 2025), 13 countries are identified as hunger hotspots. Over the last five years, a total of 26 countries have been classified as hunger hotspots at various points in time.
keyFactLabel: persons in fragile and conflict affected economies face hunger
